✓ Pairs trading uses cointegration test with proper z-score calculation
✓ Options flow uses secrets module for random generation (not random)
✓ Order flow properly computes buy/sell imbalance metrics
✓ Vol surface builds IV smile correctly with strike-wise data
✓ Frontend QuantEngine.jsx uses useCallback for loadTab function
✓ All tabs have proper data-testid attributes for testing
✓ Sidebar updated with Quant Engine nav item using Zap icon

seed_data_creation: None - uses mock data from quant modules
